summary: Apple Intelligence insights and memory chat render as structured sections, System Optimization and Settings gain icon tabs, and Disk Analysis tabs show icons too.
introduced: Apple Intelligence tab — Optimization Analysis, insights, quick actions, and follow-up chat now live in their own System Optimization tab instead of inside Memory Analyzer
New Session button — reset the memory insight chatbot to start a fresh conversation without clearing your analysis
Settings icon tabs — Scanning, Menu Bar, General, Memory, and AI each have their own tab with a sticky Settings header and full-width layout
Icon tab bars — Disk Analysis (Overview, Breakdown, Insights) and System Optimization tabs show icon + label buttons instead of plain segmented text
changed: Apple Intelligence Insights — glued AI text is normalized and rendered as structured headings, metrics, bullets, and tips instead of one dense paragraph
Memory chatbot replies — assistant bubbles use the same structured formatter so app names, sizes, and recommendations appear on separate lines with Markdown styling
Memory Analyzer tab — focuses on gauges, trends, usual consumers, and suggested actions; AI content moved to the Apple Intelligence tab
Settings panel — uses the full detail column width with a fixed title and description while only the active tab scrolls
